name: Include County State
description: Always include county and state in the property address section

name: Use Labeled Sections
description: Organize output into clearly labeled sections (e.g. LIENS, TAX STATUS, OWNERSHIP, OTHER MATTERS, REVIEWER NOTES)

name: Add Instrument Details
description: Include instrument numbers and recording details for every lien and encumbrance

name: Provide Lien Position Context
description: Add context to each lien, such as 'First Mortgage' and status, e.g. 'ASSIGNED'

name: Flag Action Required
description: Highlight items that require action or review, using 'ACTION REQUIRED' or similar notation

name: Separate Tax Information
description: Separate tax information into its own section, including delinquency status and special assessments

name: Include Reviewer Notes
description: Add a section for reviewer notes, including actionable items that the attorney should address

name: Show Chain of Title
description: Include information to show a clean chain of title, such as prior owner and mortgage satisfaction

name: Cross Reference External Info
description: Cross-reference external information, such as servicing transfer emails, to ensure accuracy and completeness

name: Highlight Delinquencies
description: Highlight delinquent taxes and other items that require attention, using 'DELINQUENT' or similar notation

name: Include Preparation Date
description: Always specify the date the document was prepared

name: Provide Court Details
description: Include court name, case number, and judge's name in the document

name: Prioritize Action Items
description: Organize tasks by urgency and importance using clear labels like URGENT, HIGH, and NORMAL

name: Cross Reference Deadlines
description: Connect deadlines with specific filing requirements and actions needed

name: Add Title Concerns Section
description: Create a dedicated section for title concerns and potential issues

name: Make Deadlines Actionable
description: Specify what action needs to be taken by each deadline, rather than just listing dates

name: Unify Information
description: Connect and integrate information from all relevant documents into a cohesive narrative

name: Include Servicer Details
description: Provide servicer contact information, including address and any relevant changes

name: Specify Payoff Amount
description: Clearly state the current payoff amount and the date it was last updated
